title: AMTP Invoice
description: An AMTP invoice (kind 24401). A signed Nostr event whose id IS the stable obligation anchor. The BOLT11 is minted just-in-time against this id, never embedded raw.

id.description: The obligation hash. Stable for weeks. Payments reference this.

$comment: Recognized tags: ['to','name@domain'] (debtor); ['amount','<sats>'] (0 or omitted = open amount); ['status','open'|'paid'|'partial'|'void']; ['expiry','<unix>'] (obligation window, NOT the BOLT11 expiry; omit = open-until-paid); ['pay','<lnurl-pay|bolt12-offer|service-url>'] (stable reference that mints a fresh BOLT11 on demand — never a raw BOLT11).
